codeReview.summary: All requirements satisfied. The effective_endpoint() logic correctly returns 'https://spikes.sh' when hosted=true (commit b94cac1), explicit endpoints take precedence over hosted flag, legacy '/spikes' suffixes are normalized to prevent doubling, and all api.spikes.sh references have been purged (commit fafa754). All 37 config-related tests pass.

summary: Reviewed endpoint-canonical fix commit fafa754. All api.spikes.sh references have been purged from the codebase. The implementation correctly: (1) Returns 'https://spikes.sh' when remote.hosted=true, (2) Prioritizes explicit endpoint over hosted flag for backward compatibility, (3) Normalizes trailing '/spikes' to avoid double paths, (4) All 37 config tests pass. Status: PASS.
